## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Platform | Android / iOS |
| OS version | e.g. Android 14 / iOS 17 |
| Device | e.g. Pixel 8 / iPhone 15 |
| App version | e.g. 0.1.0 |

## Additional Context

Any other context (logs, related issues, etc.).
